title: Battle of Thule
content:

[[Turret/Legends|turrets]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Presumably heavy *[[Mace Windu's TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank|Mace Windu's TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]] *[[Convoy 1]] |casual2=*Most forces *Dark Reaper *Dreadnought battle tank *Protodekas *Cydon Prax |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|The fate of the Republic rests on this battle.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} The '''Battle of Thule''', also known as the '''Assault on Thule''', was the final battle of the [[Dark Reaper]] [[Dark Reaper crisis|crisis]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], in which the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] managed to locate and destroy the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. ==The battle== ===Thule Moon strike=== {{Quote|A planetary shield envelops the planet, projected from the small moon orbiting it. This is our first objective. Anakin will lead a strike force on the Thule Moon to take out the shield generator.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Thule_Moon_strike.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] strike on the [[Sivvi|Thule Moon]]]] As the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] neared [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] diverted a single [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] down to the surface of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] barren [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sivvi]] to deal with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists']] [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] [[Planetary shield generator|generator]] [[Sivvi shield generator complex|complex]], landing in a large crater. Unfortunately, they were quickly detected by the Separatist forces and two [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979 landing crafts]] touched down around the crater's edge and deployed [[Ground Armored Tank]]s, [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]], and [[HAG-M|Heavy Artillery Guns]] to destroy the [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] before it could offload all of its [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]]. Skywalker took control of a [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]] and fought off the Separatist attack, allowing the [[All Terrain Experimental Transport|AT-XT]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transports]] to disembark. Taking to the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] of an AT-XT himself, Skywalker led a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of the bipedal walkers in escorting the convoy of Troop Transports carrying [[clone engineer]]s to the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] complex north of the crater. He and his men combated further attacks from GATs and AATs, but lost [[Convoy 1|one]] of the three Troop Transports in the convoy to mortars. When they approached the complex, further resistance was mounted in the form of Separatist [[Turret/Legends|gun towers]] and [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]], in addition to continuing assault from several AATs. When they were finally destroyed, Skywalker proceeded to take down three auxiliary [[Reactor/Legends|reactors]] outside the complex as the [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] managed to [[Slicer/Legends|slice]] their way into the control systems outside, bringing down the thick, armored doors. Their task completed, the engineers and the Troop Transports peeled off from the entrance as Skywalker piloted his AT-XT walker through the heavily defended generator complex and destroyed the four charger couplings that supplied power to the shield, disabling it and allowing the bulk of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army's]] forces to land on Thule. ===Aerial attack=== {{Quote|Once the shield is down, Obi-Wan will begin an aerial attack on key strategic locations across the planet.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Thule_aerial_attack.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] aerial attack on [[Thule/Legends|Thule]]]] After the strike on the Thule Moon, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] crew flew a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]] into battle on Thule, to clear a Separatist landing zone of all anti-aircraft emplacements and [[Droid/Legends|droid]] presence, including several OG-9 homing spider droids. When the grounds had been cleared, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] landed a pair of ''Acclamator''-class assault ships and began offloading gunships and armored walkers, and disembarking troops. Among the new trooper arrival was a division of clone engineers that Windu tasked with disabling the internal shields of the [[energy farm]]s surrounding and supplying power to the Separatists' [[Command Installation]]. Each was well guarded by AATs, requiring Kenobi to clear the perimeter of each before deploying the engineers aboard his gunship and then safeguarding them as they worked. When the farms' shields were down, they became easy targets for the LAAT/i gunship's weapons and were soon destroyed. Kenobi then turned his attention toward the Separatist main command center. With the loss of power resulting from the energy farms being brought down, there was little the command center could do to withhold the attack and quickly fell, crippling Separatist communications and their ability to mobilize forces across the planet. ===Ground assault=== {{Quote|I will command the ground forces in a frontal assault on the ruins of the capital city, Kesiak.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Thule_ground_assault.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] ground assault on [[Thule/Legends|Thule]]]] After the fall of the communication command center, Windu teamed with fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], leading a squad of AT-XT walkers to attack two [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighter]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]] that were allowing the Separatists the advantage in the air. Once they were destroyed and the Separatists' air presence neutralized, the two [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] left their walkers in favor of piloting TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tanks and turned their attention toward the [[Thule droid factory/Legends|droid foundries]] that still churned out AATs and mortar tanks. Unable to penetrate the thick armor with the weapons aboard their tanks, the two Jedi instead took up defensive roles for the more heavily armed and slower-moving [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE walkers]], protecting them from the incoming fire of more nimble crafts while they moved to destroy the foundries. When the walkers had obliterated the foundries and cut off the Separatists' supply of reinforcements, Unduli and Windu pushed forward toward the gates of the ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[City/Legends|city]] and [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Thule: [[Kesiak]]. On the way, however, the two encountered a pair of [[Protodeka]]s that they had to fight their way past before finally arriving at Kesiak's outer wall. There, Unduli informed Windu that Master [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] had sent in an additional ''Acclamator''-class assault ship to land reinforcements. But just as Windu approached the gates, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] hired [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], [[Cydon Prax]], attacked him in his personal [[Dreadnought battle tank]], destroying Windu's [[Mace Windu's TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank|own fighter tank]]. Though he managed to escape the blast and survive, Windu was forced to fight on foot as he made his way across the battlefield and into an underground tunnel complex that led to the gate controls. After cutting down countless [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] and destroying numerous [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]], Windu reached the controls and opened the city gates to the Republic forces en masse. ===Destruction of the Dark Reaper=== {{Quote|Finally, Anakin's strike force will land on the planet behind the city and head for the Sith Temple, to destroy the Reaper before it is activated.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Dark_Reaper_Crisis.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] facing the [[Dark Reaper]]]] As Windu's forces began entering Kesiak, Skywalker's own strike force arrived from the Thule Moon and launched an attack from the opposite side of the city. While [[Legion/Legends|legions]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] battled overwhelming numbers of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and AT-TE walkers clashed with OG-9 homing spider droids, Skywalker raced toward the city center in a fighter tank, blasting through roadblocks and Separatist forces alike. Eventually, he came across Count Dooku and Cydon Prax, guarding the [[Dark Reaper]] in his Dreadnought battle tank. Dooku took his leave—claiming "more important tasks" requiring his attention—though not before ordering Prax to kill Skywalker. The two dueled in their respective vehicles and Skywalker emerged victorious, destroying Prax and moving on to engage the Dark Reaper without awaiting backup, with the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] as his guide. Piece by piece, the Jedi first crippled the Reaper and then finally destroyed the [[Force Harvester]]—the source of the Reaper's power. With the Harvester destroyed, the Reaper could no longer function and quickly fell from the air, powerless and defeated. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|This battle may have turned the tide of the war.''"
"''Won the battle we have, but far from over, this war is.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|}} [[File:Thule_aftermath.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] after the Battle of Thule]] The Dark Reaper was, for a second time, destroyed. However, the knowledge Skywalker gained from Ulic Qel-Droma, including immunity to the Reaper's effects, was yet another thing that set him apart from his master and caused him to act more arrogantly towards Kenobi. It was possible that the battle and the power Skywalker had gained throughout the [[Dark Reaper crisis]] indirectly led him to take another step towards the path of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Count Dooku had escaped, eluding capture yet again, and the Republic forces prepared to depart for the [[Mirgoshir system/Legends|Mirgoshir system]]. Windu regarded the battle as a turning point in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]], but Yoda was less convinced, pointing out that the war was still far from over. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031211prax|text=Cydon Prax}} {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|107|SUR 3-6|The Survival of Boba Fett}} *{{FactFile|109|DEF 1-4|Defence of Kamino}} {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|116|DOO 5-8|Count Dooku}} {{Imo}} *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *{{CSWECite|multiple}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|luminaraunduli|Unduli, Luminara}} *{{FactFile2014|6|22 BBY 75-80|Dark Side Influence}} {{1stID|Battle of Thule}} *{{FactFile2014|15|RAX 1-4|Raxus Prime}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Thule |es=Batalla de Thule }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Thule, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of the Dark Reaper crisis]] [[Category:Battles of Thule]]
